rationale_top3: Nature & Location (25/35 points): Strong coastal setting on Yorke Peninsula with good beach access and natural surroundings, though entertainment offerings are moderate Entertainment & Facilities (14/20 points): Reasonable recreation amenities for families including playground and activity options typical of BIG4 standard Cleanliness & Maintenance (8/10 points): Generally well-maintained facilities meeting acceptable standards for holiday park operations
rationale_honourable: Value proposition (7/10 points) provides decent pricing relative to coastal location Site sizes (6/10 points) are adequate though not exceptionally spacious for larger rigs
water_fun: Coastal beach access on Yorke Peninsula with swimming and beach activities available nearby
kids_play: Playground facilities and moderate entertainment options suitable for children, though not extensive compared to premium parks
best_for: Beach holidays, Yorke Peninsula exploration, fishing trips, families with modest entertainment expectations
